# CrossFilter

Reactive filter context linking charts and filter controls. Charts with `filterable` geoms automatically dim or hide excluded data when a filter is active.

## Import

```javascript
import { CrossFilter, FilterBar, FilterSlider, createCrossFilter } from '@rokkit/chart'
```

## Quick Start

```svelte
<CrossFilter mode="dim">
  <FilterBar data={orders} field="category" valueField="amount" />
  <FilterSlider field="price" min={0} max={500} label="Price" />
  <BarChart data={orders} x="category" y="amount" stat="sum" />
</CrossFilter>
```

## CrossFilter Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| `crossfilter` | `CrossFilterInstance` | — | External instance (created internally if omitted) |
| `mode` | `'dim' \| 'hide'` | `'dim'` | How unselected data appears |
| `filters` | `FilterState` (bindable) | — | Read active filter state externally |

## FilterBar Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| `data` | `Object[]` | `[]` | Data rows |
| `field` | `string` | — | Categorical dimension field |
| `valueField` | `string` | — | Numeric value field for bar height |
| `stat` | `string` | `'sum'` | Aggregation stat |
| `width` | `number` | `300` | Width in pixels |
| `height` | `number` | `120` | Height in pixels |
| `mode` | `'light' \| 'dark'` | `'light'` | Palette mode |

## FilterSlider Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| `field` | `string` | — | Continuous field to filter |
| `min` | `number` | — | Range minimum |
| `max` | `number` | — | Range maximum |
| `step` | `number` | `0.1` | Step increment |
| `label` | `string` | `''` | Display label |

## createCrossFilter()

```javascript
const cf = createCrossFilter()
cf.toggleCategorical('region', 'North')
cf.setRange('price', [10, 100])
cf.clear('region')
cf.clearAll()
cf.isFiltered('region')        // boolean
cf.isSelected('region', 'North')  // boolean
cf.version                     // reactive counter
```

## Related

- [BarChart](/llms/components/bar-chart.txt) — main chart type used with CrossFilter
